chemicalDescription: Panax Ginseng Root/Poria Cocos/Ophiopogon Japonicus Root/Cornus Officinalis Fruit/Rehmannia Chinensis Root/Dioscorea Batatas Root/Glycyrrhiza Glabra Root Extract is the extract of the fungus, Poria cocos; the roots of Panax ginseng, Ophiopogon japonicus, Rehmannia Chinensis, Dioscorea batatas, the licorice Glycyrrhiza glabra; and the fruit of Cornus officinalis
